title: Alert triage from pasted raw log line
description: User pastes a raw error line and asks for triage. Canonical chain on the raw-line branch: event_lookup → resolve_batch (templatize the raw line into a stable pattern identity) → investigate. event_lookup recognizes the input as a raw log line and emits a NEXT_ACTIONS hint to resolve_batch with source='events' — the harness fix that landed in this PR. Test enforces the raw-line chain handoff.
prompt:
We're getting alerts in PagerDuty for this line — what is it and what's actually happening?

```
failed to upload metrics: Post "https://otel-collector.metrics.example.com/v1/metrics": context deadline exceeded
```

args.pattern: failed to upload metrics: Post "https://otel-collector.metrics.example.com/v1/metrics": context deadline exceeded

initial_tool.reason: User pasted a raw line — event_lookup resolves it to a stable pattern identity. When the input is detected as a raw log line, event_lookup hints into resolve_batch (the templatizer).

ground_truth.description: event_lookup recognized the input as a raw log line and emits a NEXT_ACTIONS hint to resolve_batch with source='events'
resolve_batch was invoked with source=events and the raw input as one of the events
